name: blobit-cli-skill-pack
description: Codex skills for Blobit CLI game asset workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Blobit CLI assets and Babylon game workflows
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for using the Blobit CLI and SDK as the generated asset backend for browser games, with Godogen-derived planning, review gates, Babylon architecture, and browser proof workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $blobit-cli to build a browser game with Blobit assets.
Use $blobit-cli to publish assets and load them with the SDK.
